claims.summary: Correspondence must expose volume and attention asymmetry rather than equating message count with mutuality.
claims.disposition: verify thread-object asymmetry, mutuality, clarity, and attention-lifetime fields and tests

claims.summary: A continuing relationship needs durable thread IDs, acknowledgement, reply, trace, and closure state.
claims.disposition: verify native correspondence lifecycle and right-to-ignore behavior

claims.summary: Using correspondence to dispatch semantics, mutate a peer, or change gain or control would be a live consequence.
claims.disposition: gate behind exact Mike/operator Tier 5 approval
claims.authority: No correspondence-driven semantic dispatch, peer mutation, gain, or control change is authorized.
